summary: Multi-agent deep scan inventory of codebase sectors: states, hooks, autonomy, mechanisms, relational graphs, hierarchy mapping. Requires schema-first approach with third-party skill integration and strategic agent delegation.
nextActions: 1) Load hivefiver-domain-pack-router skill for sector division strategy; 2) Dispatch hivexplorer agents to scan sectors (agents

state management); 3) Use hivefiver-mcp-research-loop for schema validation; 4) Synthesize into unified inventory document with relational graph; 5) Cross-reference with existing primitives from opencode blueprint
decisions: Schema-first approach mandatory; Multi-agent parallel dispatch for sector scanning; Third-party skill integration required for domain routing
residualRisk: Context contamination from stale artifacts; Sector overlap causing duplicate inventory; Missing relational integrity between entities
